---
title: "Peak_Notch_Boxplots_By_Click_Type"
author: "Sarah Moseley"
date: "2026-05-09"
output: html_document
---

## Setup

```{r setup}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

required_packages <- c(
  "dplyr",
  "ggplot2",
  "tidyr",
  "readr",
  "purrr",
  "tibble",
  "stringr",
  "scales"
)

missing_packages <- required_packages[
  !sapply(required_packages, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)
]

if (length(missing_packages) > 0) {
  install.packages(missing_packages)
}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(scales)

cat("Setup complete.\n")

```

## User Settings and Output Folders

```{r user_settings}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Input files
# ------------------------------------------------------------

# Main HDBSCAN assignments file from the selected analysis
# This should contain RowID, DriftID/EventID, and HDBSCAN_cluster.
hdbscan_assignments_file <- "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN/18PC/18PC_scaledICI_1/tables/PRIMARY_hdbscan_assignments_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv"

# Cluster mean spectra table from the selected analysis
# This should contain HDBSCAN_cluster, Frequency_kHz, mean_minmax_spectrum.
cluster_mean_spectra_file <- "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN/18PC/18PC_scaledICI_1/tables/clean_cluster_mean_spectra_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv"

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Output directory
# ------------------------------------------------------------

base_output_dir <- "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN/18PC/18PC_scaledICI_1/Peak_Notch_Boxplots_With_Soldevilla"

plot_dir <- file.path(base_output_dir, "plots")
table_dir <- file.path(base_output_dir, "tables")
data_dir <- file.path(base_output_dir, "data")

dir.create(plot_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(table_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(data_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Analysis labels
# ------------------------------------------------------------

analysis_label <- "18PC + 1x scaled logICI; minPts = 50"
comparison_regions <- c("Soldevilla PPac", "Soldevilla CC")

cat("Input HDBSCAN file:\n")
cat(hdbscan_assignments_file, "\n\n")

cat("Input cluster mean spectra file:\n")
cat(cluster_mean_spectra_file, "\n\n")

cat("Outputs will save to:\n")
cat(base_output_dir, "\n")

```

## Load Data

```{r load_data}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Load HDBSCAN assignments
# ------------------------------------------------------------

primary_hdbscan <- read_csv(
  hdbscan_assignments_file,
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

cat("Loaded HDBSCAN assignments.\n")
cat("Rows:", nrow(primary_hdbscan), "\n\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Load cluster mean spectra
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cluster_mean_spectra <- read_csv(
  cluster_mean_spectra_file,
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

cat("Loaded cluster mean spectra.\n")
cat("Rows:", nrow(cluster_mean_spectra), "\n\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Convert cluster labels to character
# ------------------------------------------------------------

primary_hdbscan <- primary_hdbscan %>%
  mutate(
    HDBSCAN_cluster = as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)
  )

cluster_mean_spectra <- cluster_mean_spectra %>%
  mutate(
    HDBSCAN_cluster = as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Basic sanity checks
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cat("Unique clusters in HDBSCAN table:\n")
print(sort(unique(primary_hdbscan$HDBSCAN_cluster)))

cat("\nUnique clusters in spectra table:\n")
print(sort(unique(cluster_mean_spectra$HDBSCAN_cluster)))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Check required columns
# ------------------------------------------------------------

required_hdbscan_cols <- c(
  "HDBSCAN_cluster",
  "DriftID_spectra",
  "EventID"
)

required_spectra_cols <- c(
  "HDBSCAN_cluster",
  "Frequency_kHz",
  "mean_minmax_spectrum"
)

missing_hdbscan_cols <- setdiff(
  required_hdbscan_cols,
  names(primary_hdbscan)
)

missing_spectra_cols <- setdiff(
  required_spectra_cols,
  names(cluster_mean_spectra)
)

if (length(missing_hdbscan_cols) > 0) {
  
  stop(
    "Missing columns in HDBSCAN table: ",
    paste(missing_hdbscan_cols, collapse = ", ")
  )
}

if (length(missing_spectra_cols) > 0) {
  
  stop(
    "Missing columns in spectra table: ",
    paste(missing_spectra_cols, collapse = ", ")
  )
}

cat("\nPASS: Required columns detected.\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Preview tables
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cat("\nPreview HDBSCAN table:\n")
print(head(primary_hdbscan))

cat("\nPreview spectra table:\n")
print(head(cluster_mean_spectra))

```

## Load Sampled Spectra Matrix and Frequency Grid

```{r load_sampled_spectra_matrix}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Input file needed to rebuild drift-by-cluster spectra
# ------------------------------------------------------------

sampled_spectra_matrix_file <- "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN/18PC/data/sampled_minmax_spectra_matrix_19_50_khz_18PC.rds"

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Load sampled min-max spectra matrix
# rows should match primary_hdbscan rows
# columns should match frequency bins
# ------------------------------------------------------------

sampled_spectra_matrix <- readRDS(sampled_spectra_matrix_file)

cat("Loaded sampled spectra matrix.\n")
cat("Dimensions:\n")
print(dim(sampled_spectra_matrix))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Use frequency grid from already-loaded cluster mean spectra table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

freq_focus <- cluster_mean_spectra %>%
  distinct(Frequency_kHz) %>%
  arrange(Frequency_kHz) %>%
  pull(Frequency_kHz)

cat("\nFrequency range:\n")
cat(min(freq_focus), "to", max(freq_focus), "kHz\n")

cat("\nNumber of frequency bins:", length(freq_focus), "\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Sanity checks
# ------------------------------------------------------------

if (nrow(sampled_spectra_matrix) != nrow(primary_hdbscan)) {
  stop(
    "FAIL: sampled_spectra_matrix rows do not match primary_hdbscan rows.\n",
    "Matrix rows: ", nrow(sampled_spectra_matrix), "\n",
    "HDBSCAN rows: ", nrow(primary_hdbscan)
  )
}

if (ncol(sampled_spectra_matrix) != length(freq_focus)) {
  stop(
    "FAIL: sampled_spectra_matrix columns do not match frequency grid.\n",
    "Matrix columns: ", ncol(sampled_spectra_matrix), "\n",
    "Frequency bins: ", length(freq_focus)
  )
}

cat("\nPASS: Sampled spectra matrix aligns with HDBSCAN table and frequency grid.\n")

```

## Build Drift-by-Cluster Mean Spectra

```{r build_drift_cluster_mean_spectra}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Add row index to HDBSCAN table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

primary_hdbscan_indexed <- primary_hdbscan %>%
  mutate(
    MatrixRow = row_number(),
    DriftID = DriftID_spectra,
    HDBSCAN_cluster = as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Minimum clicks required to calculate a drift-cluster spectrum
# ------------------------------------------------------------

min_clicks_per_drift_cluster <- 5

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build mean spectrum for each DriftID x cluster
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_cluster_groups <- primary_hdbscan_indexed %>%
  group_by(DriftID, HDBSCAN_cluster) %>%
  summarise(
    row_ids = list(MatrixRow),
    n_clicks = n(),
    n_events = n_distinct(EventID),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n_clicks >= min_clicks_per_drift_cluster)

cat("Number of DriftID x cluster groups retained:\n")
print(nrow(drift_cluster_groups))

cat("\nSummary of clicks per retained DriftID x cluster group:\n")
print(summary(drift_cluster_groups$n_clicks))

drift_cluster_mean_spectra <- purrr::map_dfr(
  seq_len(nrow(drift_cluster_groups)),
  function(i) {
    
    rows_i <- drift_cluster_groups$row_ids[[i]]
    
    mean_spectrum_i <- colMeans(
      sampled_spectra_matrix[rows_i, , drop = FALSE],
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
    
    tibble(
      DriftID = drift_cluster_groups$DriftID[i],
      HDBSCAN_cluster = drift_cluster_groups$HDBSCAN_cluster[i],
      n_clicks = drift_cluster_groups$n_clicks[i],
      n_events = drift_cluster_groups$n_events[i],
      Frequency_kHz = freq_focus,
      mean_minmax_spectrum = mean_spectrum_i
    )
  }
)

cat("\nRows in drift-cluster mean spectra table:\n")
print(nrow(drift_cluster_mean_spectra))

cat("\nPreview:\n")
print(head(drift_cluster_mean_spectra))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

write.csv(
  drift_cluster_mean_spectra,
  file = file.path(
    table_dir,
    "drift_cluster_mean_spectra_min5clicks.csv"
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

saveRDS(
  drift_cluster_mean_spectra,
  file = file.path(
    data_dir,
    "drift_cluster_mean_spectra_min5clicks.rds"
  )
)

cat("\nPASS: Drift-by-cluster mean spectra created and saved.\n")

```

## Peak and Notch Picking for Drift-by-Cluster Spectra

```{r peak_notch_picking_drift_cluster}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Peak/notch picking parameters
# SAME methodology as your previous workflow
# ------------------------------------------------------------

peak_nups <- 2
peak_ndowns <- 2
peak_min_distance <- 3
peak_min_height <- 0.15

notch_nups <- 2
notch_ndowns <- 2
notch_min_distance <- 3
notch_max_height <- 0.85

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Function to pick peaks/notches from one drift-cluster spectrum
# ------------------------------------------------------------

pick_features_one_spectrum <- function(one_spectrum_df) {
  
  one_spectrum_df <- one_spectrum_df %>%
    arrange(Frequency_kHz)
  
  y <- one_spectrum_df$mean_minmax_spectrum
  
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  # Peaks
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  
  peak_matrix <- pracma::findpeaks(
    y,
    nups = peak_nups,
    ndowns = peak_ndowns,
    minpeakdistance = peak_min_distance,
    minpeakheight = peak_min_height
  )
  
  if (is.null(peak_matrix)) {
    
    peaks_df <- tibble()
    
  } else {
    
    peaks_df <- tibble(
      DriftID = one_spectrum_df$DriftID[1],
      HDBSCAN_cluster = one_spectrum_df$HDBSCAN_cluster[1],
      n_clicks = one_spectrum_df$n_clicks[1],
      feature_type = "Peak",
      Frequency_kHz = one_spectrum_df$Frequency_kHz[peak_matrix[, 2]],
      feature_height = y[peak_matrix[, 2]]
    ) %>%
      arrange(Frequency_kHz) %>%
      mutate(
        feature_rank = row_number()
      ) %>%
      filter(feature_rank <= 4)
  }
  
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  # Notches
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  
  notch_matrix <- pracma::findpeaks(
    -y,
    nups = notch_nups,
    ndowns = notch_ndowns,
    minpeakdistance = notch_min_distance
  )
  
  if (is.null(notch_matrix)) {
    
    notches_df <- tibble()
    
  } else {
    
    notches_df <- tibble(
      DriftID = one_spectrum_df$DriftID[1],
      HDBSCAN_cluster = one_spectrum_df$HDBSCAN_cluster[1],
      n_clicks = one_spectrum_df$n_clicks[1],
      feature_type = "Notch",
      Frequency_kHz = one_spectrum_df$Frequency_kHz[notch_matrix[, 2]],
      feature_height = y[notch_matrix[, 2]]
    ) %>%
      filter(feature_height <= notch_max_height) %>%
      arrange(Frequency_kHz) %>%
      mutate(
        feature_rank = row_number()
      ) %>%
      filter(feature_rank <= 3)
  }
  
  bind_rows(peaks_df, notches_df)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Split spectra by DriftID x cluster
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_cluster_split <- drift_cluster_mean_spectra %>%
  group_split(DriftID, HDBSCAN_cluster)

cat("Number of spectra to peak-pick:\n")
print(length(drift_cluster_split))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Run peak/notch picking
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_cluster_features <- purrr::map_dfr(
  drift_cluster_split,
  pick_features_one_spectrum
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Create feature labels
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_cluster_features <- drift_cluster_features %>%
  mutate(
    feature_label = paste0(feature_type, " ", feature_rank),
    HDBSCAN_cluster = as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

write.csv(
  drift_cluster_features,
  file = file.path(
    table_dir,
    "drift_cluster_peak_notch_features.csv"
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

saveRDS(
  drift_cluster_features,
  file = file.path(
    data_dir,
    "drift_cluster_peak_notch_features.rds"
  )
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Summaries
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cat("\nFeature counts by type:\n")

print(
  drift_cluster_features %>%
    count(feature_label)
)

cat("\nPreview:\n")

print(head(drift_cluster_features))

cat("\nPASS: Drift-cluster peak/notch features created.\n")

```

## Soldevilla Reference Values

```{r soldevilla_reference_values}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Soldevilla et al. reference means and SDs from Table IV
# Regions used here:
#   PPac = Pelagic Pacific
#   CC   = California Current
#
# These are summary statistics, not raw data.
# We will plot them as mean ± SD reference points/error bars,
# not as boxplots.
# ------------------------------------------------------------

soldevilla_reference <- tibble(
  comparison_group = rep(
    c("Soldevilla PPac", "Soldevilla CC"),
    each = 7
  ),
  feature_label = rep(
    c(
      "Peak 1", "Peak 2", "Peak 3", "Peak 4",
      "Notch 1", "Notch 2", "Notch 3"
    ),
    times = 2
  ),
  feature_type = rep(
    c(
      "Peak", "Peak", "Peak", "Peak",
      "Notch", "Notch", "Notch"
    ),
    times = 2
  ),
  feature_rank = rep(
    c(1, 2, 3, 4, 1, 2, 3),
    times = 2
  ),
  mean_frequency_khz = c(
    # PPac
    23.5, 26.6, 31.7, 36.0,
    25.4, 28.7, 33.5,
    
    # CC
    21.8, 24.8, 31.2, 37.9,
    23.4, 27.0, 34.5
  ),
  sd_frequency_khz = c(
    # PPac
    0.9, 1.5, 0.6, 2.1,
    0.9, 1.2, 0.8,
    
    # CC
    1.0, 1.0, 1.0, 2.3,
    1.2, 0.9, 1.3
  )
) %>%
  mutate(
    lower_sd = mean_frequency_khz - sd_frequency_khz,
    upper_sd = mean_frequency_khz + sd_frequency_khz
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save reference table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

write.csv(
  soldevilla_reference,
  file = file.path(
    table_dir,
    "soldevilla_PPAC_CC_reference_values.csv"
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("Soldevilla reference values:\n")
print(soldevilla_reference)

cat("\nPASS: Soldevilla PPac and CC reference values entered and saved.\n")

```

## Boxplots with Soldevilla Reference Values

```{r plot_peak_notch_boxplots}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Feature colors: distinct colors for each peak/notch
# ------------------------------------------------------------

peak_feature_colors <- c(
  "Peak 1" = "#0072B2",  # blue
  "Peak 2" = "#D55E00",  # vermillion
  "Peak 3" = "#009E73",  # green
  "Peak 4" = "#CC79A7"   # purple/pink
)

notch_feature_colors <- c(
  "Notch 1" = "#56B4E9",  # sky blue
  "Notch 2" = "#E69F00",  # orange
  "Notch 3" = "#F0E442"   # yellow
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper plotting function
# ------------------------------------------------------------

make_feature_boxplot <- function(
    feature_type_to_plot,
    include_cluster0 = TRUE
) {
  
  plot_features <- drift_cluster_features %>%
    filter(feature_type == feature_type_to_plot)
  
  if (!include_cluster0) {
    plot_features <- plot_features %>%
      filter(HDBSCAN_cluster != "0")
  }
  
  cluster_levels <- sort(
    as.numeric(unique(plot_features$HDBSCAN_cluster))
  ) %>%
    as.character()
  
  x_levels <- c(
    paste0("Cluster ", cluster_levels),
    "Soldevilla PPac",
    "Soldevilla CC"
  )
  
  plot_features <- plot_features %>%
    mutate(
      comparison_group = paste0("Cluster ", HDBSCAN_cluster),
      comparison_group = factor(comparison_group, levels = x_levels),
      feature_label = factor(
        feature_label,
        levels = sort(unique(feature_label))
      )
    )
  
  soldevilla_plot <- soldevilla_reference %>%
    filter(feature_type == feature_type_to_plot) %>%
    mutate(
      comparison_group = factor(comparison_group, levels = x_levels),
      feature_label = factor(
        feature_label,
        levels = levels(plot_features$feature_label)
      )
    )
  
  feature_colors <- if (feature_type_to_plot == "Peak") {
    peak_feature_colors
  } else {
    notch_feature_colors
  }
  
  noise_label <- ifelse(
    include_cluster0,
    "with cluster 0 included",
    "with cluster 0 excluded"
  )
  
  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_boxplot(
      data = plot_features,
      aes(
        x = comparison_group,
        y = Frequency_kHz,
        fill = feature_label
      ),
      position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
      width = 0.65,
      alpha = 0.85,
      outlier.shape = 21,
      outlier.size = 1.5
    ) +
    geom_errorbar(
      data = soldevilla_plot,
      aes(
        x = comparison_group,
        ymin = lower_sd,
        ymax = upper_sd,
        group = feature_label
      ),
      position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
      width = 0.25,
      linewidth = 0.7,
      color = "black"
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = soldevilla_plot,
      aes(
        x = comparison_group,
        y = mean_frequency_khz,
        group = feature_label,
        fill = feature_label
      ),
      position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
      shape = 21,
      size = 3.2,
      color = "black"
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = feature_colors,
      drop = FALSE
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(feature_type_to_plot, " Frequencies by HDBSCAN Cluster"),
      subtitle = paste0(
        analysis_label,
        "; ",
        noise_label,
        "; Soldevilla shown as mean ± SD"
      ),
      x = NULL,
      y = "Frequency (kHz)",
      fill = feature_type_to_plot
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      legend.position = "right"
    )
  
  return(p)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Generate plots
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_peaks_with_0 <- make_feature_boxplot(
  feature_type_to_plot = "Peak",
  include_cluster0 = TRUE
)

p_peaks_no_0 <- make_feature_boxplot(
  feature_type_to_plot = "Peak",
  include_cluster0 = FALSE
)

p_notches_with_0 <- make_feature_boxplot(
  feature_type_to_plot = "Notch",
  include_cluster0 = TRUE
)

p_notches_no_0 <- make_feature_boxplot(
  feature_type_to_plot = "Notch",
  include_cluster0 = FALSE
)

print(p_peaks_with_0)
print(p_peaks_no_0)
print(p_notches_with_0)
print(p_notches_no_0)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save plots
# ------------------------------------------------------------

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(plot_dir, "peak_boxplots_WITH_cluster0_with_soldevilla.png"),
  plot = p_peaks_with_0,
  width = 12,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(plot_dir, "peak_boxplots_NO_cluster0_with_soldevilla.png"),
  plot = p_peaks_no_0,
  width = 11,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(plot_dir, "notch_boxplots_WITH_cluster0_with_soldevilla.png"),
  plot = p_notches_with_0,
  width = 12,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(plot_dir, "notch_boxplots_NO_cluster0_with_soldevilla.png"),
  plot = p_notches_no_0,
  width = 11,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("\nDONE. Saved peak/notch boxplots to:\n")
cat(plot_dir, "\n")

```

-------------------------------------------------

## Plotting by cluster

```{r}

required_packages <- c(
  "dplyr",
  "ggplot2",
  "tidyr",
  "readr",
  "purrr",
  "tibble",
  "stringr",
  "scales",
  "pracma"
)

```

## Point Plots from Cluster Mean Spectra with Soldevilla Reference

```{r point_plots_cluster_mean_features}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Peak/notch picking parameters
# SAME as your previous workflow
# ------------------------------------------------------------

peak_nups <- 2
peak_ndowns <- 2
peak_min_distance <- 3
peak_min_height <- 0.15

notch_nups <- 2
notch_ndowns <- 2
notch_min_distance <- 3
notch_max_height <- 0.85

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Function to pick features from one cluster mean spectrum
# ------------------------------------------------------------

pick_features_one_cluster_mean <- function(one_spectrum_df) {
  
  one_spectrum_df <- one_spectrum_df %>%
    arrange(Frequency_kHz)
  
  y <- one_spectrum_df$mean_minmax_spectrum
  
  cluster_id <- one_spectrum_df$HDBSCAN_cluster[1]
  
  # --------------------------
  # Peaks
  # --------------------------
  
  peak_matrix <- pracma::findpeaks(
    y,
    nups = peak_nups,
    ndowns = peak_ndowns,
    minpeakdistance = peak_min_distance,
    minpeakheight = peak_min_height
  )
  
  if (is.null(peak_matrix)) {
    
    peaks_df <- tibble()
    
  } else {
    
    peaks_df <- tibble(
      HDBSCAN_cluster = cluster_id,
      feature_type = "Peak",
      Frequency_kHz = one_spectrum_df$Frequency_kHz[peak_matrix[, 2]],
      feature_height = y[peak_matrix[, 2]]
    ) %>%
      arrange(Frequency_kHz) %>%
      mutate(feature_rank = row_number()) %>%
      filter(feature_rank <= 4)
  }
  
  # --------------------------
  # Notches
  # --------------------------
  
  notch_matrix <- pracma::findpeaks(
    -y,
    nups = notch_nups,
    ndowns = notch_ndowns,
    minpeakdistance = notch_min_distance
  )
  
  if (is.null(notch_matrix)) {
    
    notches_df <- tibble()
    
  } else {
    
    notches_df <- tibble(
      HDBSCAN_cluster = cluster_id,
      feature_type = "Notch",
      Frequency_kHz = one_spectrum_df$Frequency_kHz[notch_matrix[, 2]],
      feature_height = y[notch_matrix[, 2]]
    ) %>%
      filter(feature_height <= notch_max_height) %>%
      arrange(Frequency_kHz) %>%
      mutate(feature_rank = row_number()) %>%
      filter(feature_rank <= 3)
  }
  
  bind_rows(peaks_df, notches_df)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Run feature picking on cluster mean spectra
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cluster_mean_features <- cluster_mean_spectra %>%
  group_split(HDBSCAN_cluster) %>%
  purrr::map_dfr(pick_features_one_cluster_mean) %>%
  mutate(
    feature_label = paste0(feature_type, " ", feature_rank),
    HDBSCAN_cluster = as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    as.numeric(HDBSCAN_cluster),
    feature_type,
    feature_rank
  )

cat("Cluster mean picked features:\n")
print(cluster_mean_features, n = Inf)

write.csv(
  cluster_mean_features,
  file = file.path(
    table_dir,
    "cluster_mean_peak_notch_features_for_point_plot.csv"
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Distinct feature colors
# ------------------------------------------------------------

peak_feature_colors <- c(
  "Peak 1" = "#0072B2",
  "Peak 2" = "#D55E00",
  "Peak 3" = "#009E73",
  "Peak 4" = "#CC79A7"
)

notch_feature_colors <- c(
  "Notch 1" = "#0072B2",
  "Notch 2" = "#D55E00",
  "Notch 3" = "#009E73"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper function for point plots
# ------------------------------------------------------------

make_cluster_mean_point_plot <- function(
    feature_type_to_plot,
    include_cluster0 = TRUE
) {
  
  plot_features <- cluster_mean_features %>%
    filter(feature_type == feature_type_to_plot)
  
  if (!include_cluster0) {
    plot_features <- plot_features %>%
      filter(HDBSCAN_cluster != "0")
  }
  
  cluster_levels <- sort(
    as.numeric(unique(plot_features$HDBSCAN_cluster))
  ) %>%
    as.character()
  
  x_levels <- c(
    paste0("Cluster ", cluster_levels),
    "Soldevilla PPac",
    "Soldevilla CC"
  )
  
  plot_features <- plot_features %>%
    mutate(
      comparison_group = paste0("Cluster ", HDBSCAN_cluster),
      comparison_group = factor(comparison_group, levels = x_levels),
      feature_label = factor(
        feature_label,
        levels = names(
          if (feature_type_to_plot == "Peak") peak_feature_colors else notch_feature_colors
        )
      )
    )
  
  soldevilla_plot <- soldevilla_reference %>%
    filter(feature_type == feature_type_to_plot) %>%
    mutate(
      comparison_group = factor(comparison_group, levels = x_levels),
      feature_label = factor(
        feature_label,
        levels = levels(plot_features$feature_label)
      )
    )
  
  feature_colors <- if (feature_type_to_plot == "Peak") {
    peak_feature_colors
  } else {
    notch_feature_colors
  }
  
  noise_label <- ifelse(
    include_cluster0,
    "with cluster 0 included",
    "with cluster 0 excluded"
  )
  
  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_point(
      data = plot_features,
      aes(
        x = comparison_group,
        y = Frequency_kHz,
        color = feature_label
      ),
      position = position_dodge(width = 0.65),
      size = 3.8,
      alpha = 0.95
    ) +
    geom_errorbar(
      data = soldevilla_plot,
      aes(
        x = comparison_group,
        ymin = lower_sd,
        ymax = upper_sd,
        color = feature_label
      ),
      position = position_dodge(width = 0.65),
      width = 0.22,
      linewidth = 0.75
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = soldevilla_plot,
      aes(
        x = comparison_group,
        y = mean_frequency_khz,
        color = feature_label
      ),
      position = position_dodge(width = 0.65),
      size = 4.2,
      shape = 18
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = feature_colors,
      drop = FALSE
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(feature_type_to_plot, " Frequencies from Cluster Mean Spectra"),
      subtitle = paste0(
        analysis_label,
        "; ",
        noise_label,
        "; Soldevilla shown as mean ± SD"
      ),
      x = NULL,
      y = "Frequency (kHz)",
      color = feature_type_to_plot
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      legend.position = "right"
    )
  
  return(p)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Generate four plots
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_peak_points_with_0 <- make_cluster_mean_point_plot(
  feature_type_to_plot = "Peak",
  include_cluster0 = TRUE
)

p_peak_points_no_0 <- make_cluster_mean_point_plot(
  feature_type_to_plot = "Peak",
  include_cluster0 = FALSE
)

p_notch_points_with_0 <- make_cluster_mean_point_plot(
  feature_type_to_plot = "Notch",
  include_cluster0 = TRUE
)

p_notch_points_no_0 <- make_cluster_mean_point_plot(
  feature_type_to_plot = "Notch",
  include_cluster0 = FALSE
)

print(p_peak_points_with_0)
print(p_peak_points_no_0)
print(p_notch_points_with_0)
print(p_notch_points_no_0)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save plots
# ------------------------------------------------------------

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(plot_dir, "peak_POINTPLOT_cluster_means_WITH_cluster0_with_soldevilla.png"),
  plot = p_peak_points_with_0,
  width = 12,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(plot_dir, "peak_POINTPLOT_cluster_means_NO_cluster0_with_soldevilla.png"),
  plot = p_peak_points_no_0,
  width = 11,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(plot_dir, "notch_POINTPLOT_cluster_means_WITH_cluster0_with_soldevilla.png"),
  plot = p_notch_points_with_0,
  width = 12,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(plot_dir, "notch_POINTPLOT_cluster_means_NO_cluster0_with_soldevilla.png"),
  plot = p_notch_points_no_0,
  width = 11,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("\nDONE. Saved point plots to:\n")
cat(plot_dir, "\n")

```


```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Cluster 7: event-level occurrence AND click-level abundance
# ------------------------------------------------------------

target_cluster <- "4"

# Total unique events
total_events <- primary_hdbscan %>%
  distinct(EventID) %>%
  nrow()

# Events containing at least one cluster-7 click
events_with_target_cluster <- primary_hdbscan %>%
  filter(HDBSCAN_cluster == target_cluster) %>%
  distinct(EventID) %>%
  nrow()

percent_events_with_target_cluster <-
  100 * events_with_target_cluster / total_events

# Total clicks
total_clicks <- nrow(primary_hdbscan)

# Cluster-7 clicks
clicks_in_target_cluster <- primary_hdbscan %>%
  filter(HDBSCAN_cluster == target_cluster) %>%
  nrow()

percent_clicks_in_target_cluster <-
  100 * clicks_in_target_cluster / total_clicks

# Print summary
cat("Target cluster:", target_cluster, "\n\n")

cat("EVENT-LEVEL OCCURRENCE\n")
cat("Total events:", total_events, "\n")
cat("Events containing cluster", target_cluster, ":", events_with_target_cluster, "\n")
cat("Percent of events containing cluster", target_cluster, ":",
    round(percent_events_with_target_cluster, 2), "%\n\n")

cat("CLICK-LEVEL ABUNDANCE\n")
cat("Total clicks:", total_clicks, "\n")
cat("Clicks assigned to cluster", target_cluster, ":", clicks_in_target_cluster, "\n")
cat("Percent of clicks assigned to cluster", target_cluster, ":",
    round(percent_clicks_in_target_cluster, 2), "%\n")

```
